lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Inara — Engineers
sources.what: Engineer unlock requirements, meeting prerequisites, hand-in items, locations, and referral chains for all 38.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Engineer roster cross-referenced against the open data set; blueprint and modification grades each engineer offers.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous Fandom Wiki
sources.what: Engineer biographies, lore, in-game descriptions, unlock-mechanics cross-checks, and the engineer portrait images used on this page.

sources.label: EDSM
sources.what: Engineer base systems & workshop bodies — Deciat, Khun, Wyrd and the rest of the location coordinates.

sources.label: EDEngineer
sources.what: Material-cost and unlock-item cross-checks for each engineer's hand-in.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Engineering tutorial: unlocking engineers, planning module upgrades, and using the ED Engineer app to map grinds.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream walkthrough of unlocking the Odyssey on-foot engineers, covering invite conditions and unlock steps.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream walkthrough of unlocking the Colonia-region engineers, covering invite requirements and the trek out to Colonia.
